full_text:
Zhang Mao (Yanlin) 張茂 (彥林)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Mao (張茂), styledYanlin (彥林). Remonstrated Cao Rui over his building works and was punished for it. Zhang Mao was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
